heroTitle: Fix messy business operations with systems that actually fit your workflow.
heroSubtitle: Hurevo helps growing companies streamline operations through ERP implementation, workflow automation, system integration, and custom internal tools designed around real business processes.
credibilityLine1: Trusted for practical digital transformation across operations, finance, HR, and internal workflows.
credibilityLine2: Built for companies that need clearer processes, fewer manual tasks, and systems that support growth instead of slowing it down.
problemTitle: Fragmented operations are holding your business back
problemPara1: Most growing businesses do not fail because they lack software. They struggle because their operations are spread across spreadsheets, chat messages, disconnected tools, and repetitive manual work.
problemPara2: That creates reporting delays, data inconsistency, team dependency, and decision-making friction. Hurevo helps turn those fragmented workflows into integrated operating systems the business can actually run on.
servicesSubheader: End-to-end support for improving how your business operates.
service1Desc: Map current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and define the highest-impact opportunities for digitization, automation, and system improvement.
service2Desc: Design and build business systems for finance, operations, HR, inventory, approvals, customer management, and other internal processes.
service3Desc: Connect disconnected tools, remove duplicate work, automate repetitive steps, and improve data flow across the organization.
service4Desc: Support founders and management teams with technology planning, system architecture decisions, implementation strategy, and digital execution oversight.
whyHurevoSubheader: We approach every engagement differently — focused on outcomes that actually matter for your business.
whyHurevo1Desc: The work starts from operational problems, not from trendy tools. Every recommendation is tied to workflow clarity, adoption, and measurable efficiency.
whyHurevo2Desc: Hurevo does not stop at slides and recommendations. The engagement can continue through implementation, iteration, and technical delivery.
whyHurevo3Desc: The focus is on solutions that are realistic to adopt, maintain, and scale for companies that need progress without enterprise-level complexity.
exampleOutcomesSubheader: The kind of operational improvements we help businesses achieve.
outcome1: Replace manual cross-team reporting with a centralized workflow dashboard.
outcome2: Reduce duplicate data entry by integrating finance, HR, operations, or sales processes.
outcome3: Improve approval speed with automated status tracking and role-based workflows.
outcome4: Launch custom internal tools that match the way the business already operates.
processSubheader: A structured approach that keeps the focus on real operational improvement.
processStep1Desc: Review the current process, business pain points, team dependencies, and existing tools.
processStep2Desc: Translate operational needs into a system plan, workflow structure, and implementation roadmap.
processStep3Desc: Implement the solution through configuration, integration, automation, or custom development.
processStep4Desc: Refine the system based on usage, feedback, and operational performance after rollout.
whoItsForSubheader: Hurevo is a strong fit for businesses at this stage.
whoItsFor3: Teams adopting ERP or internal business systems
whoItsFor4: Businesses that need automation without losing process control
whoItsFor5: Founders who want a technology partner that understands business workflow
caseStudyTitle: From fragmented workflow to integrated operations
caseStudyDesc: A typical engagement starts when teams are working across multiple disconnected tools with limited visibility and too much manual coordination. Hurevo maps the workflow, redesigns the process, and implements a system structure that improves accuracy, speed, and accountability.
caseStudyFormatHint: Suggested format for real case studies: Client context — Operational problem — Solution delivered — Systems or modules implemented — Business result
faqSubheader: Common questions about working with Hurevo.
faq1A: No. Hurevo can support both advisory work and hands-on implementation, depending on the scope and business need.
faq2Q: Do you only work with large companies?
faq2A: No. The service is designed to be practical for growing businesses that need better systems before complexity becomes expensive.
faq3Q: Can you work with our current tools?
faq3A: Yes. The goal is not always to replace everything, but to improve process flow using the right combination of existing tools, integrations, and custom systems.
faq4Q: What kinds of systems can you help with?
faq4A: ERP modules, workflow approvals, operational dashboards, HR processes, finance operations, integrations, and custom internal platforms.
contactHeader: Build operations that scale with your business
contactSubheader: If your team is still relying on manual workarounds, disconnected tools, or unclear workflows, Hurevo can help turn that into a system your business can grow on.
contactSupportLine: Start with a conversation about your current workflow, bottlenecks, and transformation priorities.
contactStartNote: Most projects start within 2 weeks of our first call.
footerTagline: Hurevo is operating under legal entity PT Sarang Nalar Karya
seoDefaultTitle: Hurevo — Operations & Systems Consulting for Growing Businesses
seoDefaultDescription: Hurevo helps growing companies streamline operations through ERP implementation, workflow automation, system integration, and custom internal tools.
projectNotFoundDesc: The project you are looking for does not exist.
projectCtaTitle: Build your next enterprise solution with us
projectCtaDesc: Let's discuss how we can build a scalable and secure platform like {projectTitle} tailored for your specific business needs.
hcsHeader: Managed Cloud Hosting untuk Developer Indonesia
hcsSubheader: Fokus pada bisnis Anda, biarkan kami mengelola server. Hosting terkelola untuk WordPress, Laravel, dan n8n dengan dukungan lokal.
hcsWordPressDesc: Hosting terkelola untuk website WordPress Anda.
hcsWordPressIdeal: Company profiles, blogs, brochures, simple online stores
hcsLaravelDesc: Hosting terkelola untuk aplikasi Laravel Anda.
hcsLaravelIdeal: Custom apps, dashboards, admin panels, APIs
hcsN8nDesc: Instance n8n yang berjalan 24/7 untuk otomasi bisnis.
hcsN8nIdeal: WhatsApp follow-ups, payment notifications, order syncing
hcsAgencyDesc: Solusi lengkap untuk agency dengan multiple klien.
hcsAgencyIdeal: Freelancers and agencies with multiple client projects
hcsValueIndonesianDesc: Harga dalam Rupiah, dukungan dalam Bahasa Indonesia, metode pembayaran lokal.
hcsValueNoServerDesc: Pelanggan tidak perlu menyentuh terminal server. Kami handle semua teknis.
hcsValueAgencyDesc: Dirancang untuk mengelola multiple proyek klien dengan mudah.
hcsValueCloudDesc: Bekerja di AWS, GCP, DigitalOcean, Vultr, dan lainnya.
hcsWhyChooseSubheader: Kami memahami kebutuhan developer dan agency di Indonesia
hcsBottomCTA: Butuh solusi custom? Hubungi kami untuk diskusi lebih lanjut.
